text:
Stefan Walter schrieb:
> Hi Christoph,
> 
> as far as I can see, there hasn't been any reaction by the maintainer to
> your problem report ports/127899 [1], which means that it might be up to
> you to provide a patch for an update that can be applied to the port.
> 
> Regards,
> Stefan
> 
> [1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/127899

The patch has been submitted
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=128489&cat=ports

Regards,
	Christoph
